skills.description: Interactively generate source images (and optionally short videos) for a herm eikon avatar, iterate on them with the user, and land them under ~/.hermes/eikons/<name>/source/ so the Eikon Studio tab can tune and bake them. This is the agent-driven counterpart to Studio's one-shot Generate dialog.
